title: Smoky Argentine Corn Casserole
description: A hearty and flavorful casserole made with smoky corn, argentine spices, and a hint of smokiness. Perfect for a family dinner or a casual gathering.
instructions: In a large skillet, sauté the onion and garlic until softened.
Add the corn, Argentine spices, and smoky paprika. Cook for 2-3 minutes.
In a separate saucepan, melt the butter and whisk in the milk.
Bring the mixture to a simmer and cook for 2-3 minutes.
Stir in the grated cheddar until melted and smooth.
Add the cooked corn mixture to the cheese sauce and stir to combine.
Transfer the mixture to a 9x13 inch baking dish.
Season with salt and black pepper to taste.
Bake for 25-30 minutes or until golden brown.
